RemoveIpAddressGroupFromIpAddressFamily.ipGroupId: The ID of the IP address family
RemoveIpAddressGroupFromIpAddressFamily.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
RemoveIpAddressGroupFromIpAddressFamily.ipSetIds: IDs of the IP address groups to remove, up to 5 per request
